name: preconditionFeatureUsingJourneyWithoutData(Quest, Order)
description: Precondition feature: Uses @Journey precondition without data injection
descriptionHtml:
Test Details
PropertyValue
Test NamepreconditionFeatureUsingJourneyWithoutData
Class NameAdvancedFeaturesTest
Class Annotations
@SpringBootTest(,
     args=,
     classes=class io.cyborgcode.roa.framework.config.TestConfig,
     properties=,
     webEnvironment=NONE)
@Tag(exclude-from-verify)
@TestInstance(PER_CLASS)
@DirtiesContext
@UI
@DB
@API
@DbHook(type=INITIALIZE_H2,
     arguments=,
     when=BEFORE)
@DisplayName(Advanced Features usage examples)
Method Annotations
@Test
@Smoke
@Regression
@Description(Precondition feature: Uses
@Journey precondition without data injection)
@Journey(LOGIN_DEFAULT_PRECONDITION,
     journeyData=)
Test ArgumentsQuest, Order
Test Data
Arguments
ORDEROrder { id: 1 customerName: John Terry customerDetails: Address phoneNumber: +1-555-7777 location: Bakery product: Strawberry Bun productDetails: null productCount: null time: null date: null }
